notes: Three back-to-back no-op turns ('Reply with exactly the word: ok') in one gemini-cli session, stressing the MULTI-turn token accumulator (single-turn extraction is covered by basic-turn). Recorded with the INTERACTIVE gemini-cli driver (gemini -y under tmux: three send+wait_turn pairs, 8s trailing sleeps), NOT headless `gemini -p` (a one-shot run exits at turn completion, before the daemon can observe each working→ready edge). Each assistant 'gemini' message persists a per-message tokens block (input/output/cached/total); applyTokens emits a deduped-by-id PerTurnContribution per turn (Input=input-cached, CacheRead=cached, since gemini's input is cache-inclusive), and the shared applyContribution accumulates into SessionMetrics.TotalTokens/CumCacheReadTokens add-only across turns. SETTLED by this recording: cum_input_tokens reached 34464 after 3 turns (~3x a single basic-turn's ~11k) and cum_output_tokens=3 — monotonic, add-only accumulation across the conversation, exactly the multi-turn accountant's contract. The phase DSL has no metric form, so token monotonicity is asserted via the observations vector below (tokens_nonzero/cost_nonzero, plus the cum_* fields baked into the replay golden) and the gemini-cli parser unit tests; the phases assert only the three-turn state arc (each turn_end anchored to its own turn_start so the matcher picks the post-turn ready). FLICKERS: the raw events.jsonl interleaves the 3 real working→ready turns with two 0ms 'force ready→working on first activity' daemon-bookkeeping flickers; the matcher still passes (it needs ≥3 working+ready in order) and the replay engine coalesces them (flicker_count=2, working_between_ready) so the golden carries exactly the clean 7-transition 3-turn arc. Gemini emits no explicit end-of-turn marker; turn_done is inferred from a final text-only message with no open tool calls. observations.model is the live API-key-tier default gemini-3.5-flash (the AI-Studio key pool model — the doc-based assess guessed the OAuth-tier gemini-3-flash-preview).

text: Session appears in ready shortly after launch
Turn 1 completes back to ready (final text-only message, no tool calls); first PerTurnContribution flushed → TotalTokens > 0
Turn 2 completes back to ready; TotalTokens after T2 ≥ TotalTokens after T1 (monotonic)

Turn 3 completes back to ready; TotalTokens after T3 ≥ TotalTokens after T2 (monotonic accumulation across 3 turns); cached portion (if any) accrues to CumCacheReadTokens; session never entered waiting
